    A

    advanceMonthly(LocalDate) - Method in class com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.service.UserFinancialStateService
    Advance a date by one month while keeping the original day when possible.
    advanceYearly(LocalDate) - Method in class com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.service.UserFinancialStateService
    Advance a date by one year while keeping the original day when possible.
